title: Aurora PvP Server-side OptOut
description: An opt-out for Fabric, Paper, and Spigot servers 1.21 - 26.1 of my pvp client mod (you shouldn't get this, only get if you dislike my main mod :c)
body:
# Hi 
[PLEASE ONLY GET THIS IF YOU DON'T WANT MY MOD ON YOUR SERVER] My mod isn't hacks, I PROMISE.
This is a quick re-upload of my server-side mod that I will be removing for my main mod - https://modrinth.com/mod/aurora-pvp

It is gonna be really small, but don't worry, it should work just fine, and if not, I will try my best to fix it.
